M

Manufacturer - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo
Deprecated.
API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
  • Supply.getConsumableTypeEnum()
  • Supply.getMakeAndModel()
  • Supply.getProductNumber()
  • Supply.getSerialNumber()
  • Supply.getDescription()
  • Supply.getMarkerColor()
  • Supply.getApproxPercentRemaining()
  • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
  • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
"
Margins - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Provides margin
Margins(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.Margins
constructor to create a new instance of Margins for scanned images.
MassStorageInfo - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage
Provides available storage details from a printer.
MassStorageInfo.Protocol - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage
Supported Protocol for accessing to mass storage
MassStorageInfo.StorageType - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage
Supported type of storage
MassStorageService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage
Provides interfaces to access mass storage.
MassStorageService.AbstractMassStorageChangeObserver - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage
Provides a mechanism to monitor the state of the MassStorageService events.
MeBuilder() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.MeBuilder
Constructor to create a new ScanToMe Builder for sending scanned images back to the application with default attributes.

Color Mode = DEFAULT
Document Format = DEFAULT
Scan Size = DEFAULT
Resolution = DEFAULT
